title: Cork - Tryphophobia removal pack (Archive)
description: A resource pack to fix certain trypophobia inducing textures in mods like Biomes o' plenty and Alex's mobs
body:
`This is a re-upload of a project I originally posted to curseforge, that I have since removed. I've posted it to modrinth for posterity sake, but it will likely receive no future support. The following is a verbatim copy of the original curseforge description.`

 CONTENT WARNING: I figure this is obvious, but just in case it wasn't, the images tab for this project contains trypophobia inducing images, to show the difference between the original and the fixed textures.

 

Currently this pack only changes the textures of the porous flesh block and the nether wasps painting in Biomes O Plenty, but I'm open to expanding this pack to cover many versions and many mods, if you have a mod you want to be included, or even a vanilla block, or a texture added by another texture pack, feel free to let me know in the comments and I'll try my best to add it into the pack!

 

I might consider making other packs for other phobias if this gets enough attention, but that would require a lot more effort on my part, so that's more of a possibility than a guarantee.

 

I mostly made this pack for myself, but hopefully it can help other people as well. <3
